title: 4 Rovaniemi (Helsinki pre/post), winter NY

day_descriptions.Day 1: Fly Helsinki then onward to Rovaniemi. Transfer to your hotel. Evening in Santa's hometown — the Arctic Circle crossing is marked right at the airport. Overnight Rovaniemi.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Reindeer sleigh safari through the Arctic forest. Visit Santa's Village and cross the Arctic Circle officially. Overnight Rovaniemi.
day_descriptions.Day 3: Husky safari — drive a team of huskies through the taiga. Snowmobile experience. Northern Lights evening excursion. Overnight Rovaniemi.
day_descriptions.Day 4: New Year's Eve. Snowshoe walk or cross-country skiing by day. Midnight fireworks over the Kemijoki river. The Arctic sky in winter is extraordinary. Overnight Rovaniemi.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Transfer to Rovaniemi airport. Fly Helsinki for connection home.

description: Rovaniemi at New Year — Santa's hometown, reindeer sleigh rides, husky safaris and midnight fireworks under the Arctic sky.
